payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark brown/black leather couch showing the right-side padded armrest and adjacent seat cushion with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and visible seam stitching; the couch is edge-cropped in the image and appears close to the camera (about 0.8 m).
